title: senecillis glauca
intro: Senecillis glauca, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter tonic and a laxative, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecillis glauca include its ability to aid digestion, relieve indigestion and constipation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecillis glauca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
